title: gleichenia dichotoma var. nervosa
intro: Gleichenia dichotoma var. nervosa, also known as the Nervous Rasp Fern, is a variety of fern that belongs to the Gleicheniaceae family. This plant is native to Australia and New Zealand, and it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The leaves of Gleichenia dichotoma var. nervosa are said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and promoting wound healing.
